questions.q: A May 2026 study featured in The Guardian showed that participants given a single dose of psilocybin (magic mushrooms) were more likely to abstain from what addictive substance compared to a placebo group?
Seagate shares tumbled in May 2026 after CEO Dave Mosley stated that building new factories to meet AI-driven memory chip demand would result in what?
options: It would violate US export bans

questions.q: Which former Google CEO was met with boos from students during a May 2026 commencement speech at the University of Arizona after making remarks about artificial intelligence?
In May 2026, a contractor for which US federal agency was found to have inadvertently exposed highly privileged AWS GovCloud keys on a public GitHub repository?
In a May 2026 public letter ahead of its shareholder meeting, Lululemon's board rejected proxy board nominees from which founder, calling his perspectives "misguided"?
Which fast-food franchisee sued its parent company in May 2026 for $100 million, alleging its 'Dragontail' AI delivery system caused cascading operational breakdowns?
What NHL team did the Montreal Canadiens defeat in Game 7 overtime to advance to the 2026 Eastern Conference final?
The Justice Department announced a $1.7 billion 'Anti-Weaponization Fund' to compensate Trump allies in a deal resolving his lawsuit against which federal agency?
In May 2026, an active shooting being investigated as a hate crime left three people dead at which religious facility in Southern California?
In a May 2026 interview, Barnes & Noble CEO James Daunt expressed his willingness to sell which type of controversial content in stores, provided it isn't "masquerading"?
